prompt: Create a hyper-realistic full-body street fashion photograph of a young East Asian woman standing confidently in the foreground of a busy nighttime city plaza at Shibuya Station, Tokyo. She has long slightly messy brown hair with bangs, natural makeup, a calm direct gaze into the camera, and a relaxed walking pose with one leg crossing in front of the other. She wears a strapless ruched silver-gray mini dress and clear high-heeled sandals, with bare shoulders and minimal accessories. The background shows a crowded urban station square after rain, with wet brick pavement reflecting warm lights, groups of commuters and pedestrians, mid-rise buildings, train tracks or elevated structures, glowing streetlights with starburst flares, and dramatic dark storm clouds overhead. Include prominent station signage reading JR 渋谷駅 shibuya station and a large billboard with Japanese advertising text reading いったい世界、未知の場所へ。. Use a wide-angle low-to-mid camera perspective, full-body framing, cinematic editorial realism, high dynamic range, shallow-to-moderate depth of field, detailed skin texture, natural proportions, warm city lights contrasting with a moody gray sky, and realistic reflections on the pavement. The image should feel like a professional fashion shoot captured candidly in a crowded urban night scene, with no watermark, no extra captions, and no distorted anatomy.
promptEn: Create a hyper-realistic full-body street fashion photograph of a young East Asian woman standing confidently in the foreground of a busy nighttime city plaza at Shibuya Station, Tokyo. She has long slightly messy brown hair with bangs, natural makeup, a calm direct gaze into the camera, and a relaxed walking pose with one leg crossing in front of the other. She wears a strapless ruched silver-gray mini dress and clear high-heeled sandals, with bare shoulders and minimal accessories. The background shows a crowded urban station square after rain, with wet brick pavement reflecting warm lights, groups of commuters and pedestrians, mid-rise buildings, train tracks or elevated structures, glowing streetlights with starburst flares, and dramatic dark storm clouds overhead. Include prominent station signage reading JR 渋谷駅 shibuya station and a large billboard with Japanese advertising text reading いったい世界、未知の場所へ。. Use a wide-angle low-to-mid camera perspective, full-body framing, cinematic editorial realism, high dynamic range, shallow-to-moderate depth of field, detailed skin texture, natural proportions, warm city lights contrasting with a moody gray sky, and realistic reflections on the pavement. The image should feel like a professional fashion shoot captured candidly in a crowded urban night scene, with no watermark, no extra captions, and no distorted anatomy.
promptZh: 创作一张超写实的全身街头时尚摄影作品，画面前景是一位年轻的东亚女性，她自信地站在 东京涩谷站 繁忙的城市广场上。她留着微乱的棕色长发，配有刘海，妆容自然，神情冷静地直视镜头，姿态放松，双腿交叠行走。她身穿抹胸褶皱银灰色迷你裙，脚蹬透明高跟凉鞋，双肩裸露，配饰极简。背景是雨后拥挤的城市车站广场，湿润的砖石路面反射着温暖的灯光，周围有通勤者和行人，中高层建筑，铁轨或高架结构，带有星芒效果的明亮路灯，以及头顶阴沉的暴雨云。画面中应包含醒目的车站标识，文字为 JR 渋谷駅 shibuya station，以及一块巨大的广告牌，上面的日文广告语为 いったい世界、未知の場所へ。。采用广角低至中机位视角，全身构图，电影级编辑写实风格，高动态范围，浅至中等景深，细腻的皮肤纹理，自然的身体比例，温暖的城市灯光与阴郁的灰色天空形成对比，路面反射效果真实。整张照片应呈现出在拥挤的城市夜景中抓拍的专业时尚大片质感，无水印，无额外标题，且人体结构无畸变。
